tagline.en: The garden is changing -- watch the colors shift!
tagline.da: Haven forandrer sig -- se farverne skifte!

theme.hero_task: Spot three signs that autumn is on its way

tasks.action: Autumn observation walk: spot 3 signs of the season changing

prompt.en: Walk the garden and find 3 autumn signs: shorter days, cooler mornings, or leaves turning?
prompt.da: Gaa gennem haven og find 3 efteraarstegn: kortere dage, koligere morgener, eller blade der skifter farve?

tasks.action: Harvest tomatoes, peppers, cucumbers from Bed C

prompt.en: The plants are slowing down -- pick everything that's ripe!
prompt.da: Planterne saaetner farten -- pluk alt der er modent!

tasks.action: Water beds that need it (less frequent now)

prompt.en: Check the soil -- if it's damp already, skip that bed today.
prompt.da: Tjek jorden -- hvis den allerede er fugtig, spring det bed over i dag.

tasks.action: Pick last radishes from final succession sowing

prompt.en: Pull the last radishes of the season! How do they compare to the first ones?
prompt.da: Traek de sidste radiser for saesonen! Hvordan er de sammenlignet med de foerste?

prompt.en: Raspberries are still going! These late ones are often the sweetest.
prompt.da: Hindbaererne baerer stadig! De sene er tit de soedeste.

growth_events.event: Strawberry runners visible -- long stems with baby plants

prompt.en: See the baby strawberry plants at the end of the long strings? The mother plant is making babies!
prompt.da: Ser du de smaa jordbaerplanter i enden af de lange snore? Moderplanten laver babyer!

growth_events.event: Cucumber production slowing as temperatures drop

prompt.en: The cucumber leaves are looking tired -- it's almost done for the year.
prompt.da: Agurkens blade ser traette ud -- den er naesten faerdig for i aar.
